name: the dispatch treats an unadapted routed tool as not_enforced rather than a vacuous green
command: printf 'plain\n' > f.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file f.md --tools trivy 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'tool=trivy verdict=not_enforced' e.txt && echo unadapted-not-enforced 1>&2
